name: backproj
description: Reproject coordinates through any CRS via proj-wasm

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --format=esm --external:proj-wasm --external:@mapbox/vector-tile --external:pbf --external:vt-pbf --external:@wcohen/wasmts --external:lru-cache --define:__DEV__=false --minify --sourcemap --outfile=dist/backproj.mjs && esbuild src/tile-worker.ts --bundle --format=iife --define:__DEV__=false --minify --sourcemap --outfile=dist/tile-worker.js && tsc --build
scripts.build:dev: rm -rf dist && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --format=esm --external:proj-wasm --external:@mapbox/vector-tile --external:pbf --external:vt-pbf --external:@wcohen/wasmts --external:lru-cache --define:__DEV__=true --sourcemap --outfile=dist/backproj.mjs && esbuild src/tile-worker.ts --bundle --format=iife --define:__DEV__=true --sourcemap --outfile=dist/tile-worker.js && tsc --build
